owasp:api1:2023-broken-object-level-auth.name: owasp:api1:2023-broken-object-level-authorization
owasp:api1:2023-broken-object-level-auth.description: OWASP API1:2023 - Check that all path parameters have associated security schemes to prevent Broken Object Level Authorization (BOLA).
owasp:api1:2023-broken-object-level-auth.message: {{description}}. Path '{{path}}' should define security schemes to protect object-level access.

owasp:api1:2023-no-unevaluated-propertie.name: owasp:api1:2023-no-unevaluated-properties
owasp:api1:2023-no-unevaluated-propertie.description: OWASP API1:2023 - Schemas should restrict unevaluated properties to prevent mass assignment leading to BOLA.
owasp:api1:2023-no-unevaluated-propertie.message: {{description}}. Schema '{{path}}' should set additionalProperties to false.

owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-no.name: owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-no-empty-security
owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-no.description: OWASP API2:2023 - Security schemes must not be empty to prevent Broken Authentication.
owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-no.message: {{description}}. Operation '{{path}}' has an empty security array, allowing unauthenticated access.

owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-jw.name: owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-jwt-best-practices
owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-jw.description: OWASP API2:2023 - Security scheme using JWT should use a URL to restrict the algorithm (e.g. RS256).
owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-jw.message: {{description}}. Security scheme '{{path}}' should define bearerFormat as 'JWT' for bearer tokens.

owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-gl.name: owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-global-security
owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-gl.description: OWASP API2:2023 - Global security field should be defined to enforce authentication by default.
owasp:api2:2023-broken-authentication-gl.message: {{description}}. The OpenAPI document does not have a global 'security' field.

owasp:api3:2023-broken-object-property-l.name: owasp:api3:2023-broken-object-property-level-authorization
owasp:api3:2023-broken-object-property-l.description: OWASP API3:2023 - Response schemas should define properties explicitly to prevent excessive data exposure.
owasp:api3:2023-broken-object-property-l.message: {{description}}. Schema at '{{path}}' should define its properties explicitly.

owasp:api3:2023-no-additionalProperties-.name: owasp:api3:2023-no-additionalProperties-in-response
owasp:api3:2023-no-additionalProperties-.description: OWASP API3:2023 - Response object schemas should not allow additional properties to prevent data leakage.

owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.name: owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-consumption-rate-limit
owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.description: OWASP API4:2023 - Responses should include rate limiting headers to prevent unrestricted resource consumption.
owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.message: {{description}}. Response '{{path}}' should contain rate limiting headers (X-RateLimit-Limit, RateLimit).

owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.name: owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-consumption-array-limit
owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.description: OWASP API4:2023 - Array schemas should define maxItems to prevent memory exhaustion attacks.

owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.name: owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-consumption-string-limit
owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.description: OWASP API4:2023 - String schemas should define maxLength to prevent abuse.

owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.name: owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-consumption-integer-limit
owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.description: OWASP API4:2023 - Integer schemas should define maximum to prevent unreasonable values.

owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.name: owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-consumption-pagination
owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.description: OWASP API4:2023 - GET endpoints returning lists should support pagination parameters.
owasp:api4:2023-unrestricted-resource-co.message: {{description}}. GET operation at '{{path}}' that returns an array should support pagination.

owasp:api5:2023-broken-function-level-au.name: owasp:api5:2023-broken-function-level-authorization-admin-security
owasp:api5:2023-broken-function-level-au.description: OWASP API5:2023 - Admin endpoints should have stricter security to prevent Broken Function Level Authorization.
owasp:api5:2023-broken-function-level-au.message: {{description}}. Admin-related path '{{path}}' must define security schemes.

owasp:api5:2023-broken-function-level-au.name: owasp:api5:2023-broken-function-level-authorization-method-restriction
owasp:api5:2023-broken-function-level-au.description: OWASP API5:2023 - Sensitive operations (POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH) should require authentication.
owasp:api5:2023-broken-function-level-au.message: {{description}}. Write operation at '{{path}}' must define security.

owasp:api6:2023-unrestricted-access-to-s.name: owasp:api6:2023-unrestricted-access-to-sensitive-business-flows
owasp:api6:2023-unrestricted-access-to-s.description: OWASP API6:2023 - Sensitive business flows should have rate limiting and security mechanisms.
owasp:api6:2023-unrestricted-access-to-s.message: {{description}}. Sensitive operation at '{{path}}' should include rate limit response (429).

owasp:api7:2023-server-side-request-forg.name: owasp:api7:2023-server-side-request-forgery-no-http-urls
owasp:api7:2023-server-side-request-forg.description: OWASP API7:2023 - Server URLs should use HTTPS to prevent SSRF and MITM attacks.
owasp:api7:2023-server-side-request-forg.message: {{description}}. Server URL '{{value}}' should use HTTPS instead of HTTP.

owasp:api7:2023-server-side-request-forg.name: owasp:api7:2023-server-side-request-forgery-url-validation
owasp:api7:2023-server-side-request-forg.description: OWASP API7:2023 - URL parameters accepting user input should define format to prevent SSRF.
owasp:api7:2023-server-side-request-forg.message: {{description}}. URL parameter at '{{path}}' should define 'format: uri' with pattern validation.

owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguratio.name: owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguration-cors
owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguratio.description: OWASP API8:2023 - Servers should not use wildcard URLs that may indicate CORS misconfiguration.
owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguratio.message: {{description}}. Server URL at '{{path}}' should not use wildcards.

owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguratio.name: owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguration-error-response
owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguratio.description: OWASP API8:2023 - Error responses (4xx, 5xx) should be defined to avoid exposing stack traces or internal details.
owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguratio.message: {{description}}. Operation at '{{path}}' should define error responses (4xx/5xx).

owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguratio.name: owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguration-define-security-schemes
owasp:api8:2023-security-misconfiguratio.description: OWASP API8:2023 - The API should define security schemes in components.

owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.name: owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-management-description
owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.description: OWASP API9:2023 - All operations should have descriptions for proper inventory management.
owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.message: {{description}}. Operation at '{{path}}' should have a description.

owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.name: owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-management-servers
owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.description: OWASP API9:2023 - API should define servers to allow proper inventory management and avoid exposing debug/staging endpoints.
owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.message: {{description}}. The document should define at least one server.

owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.name: owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-management-no-api-versioning
owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.description: OWASP API9:2023 - Server URLs should include API versioning for proper lifecycle management.
owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.message: {{description}}. Server URL '{{value}}' should include a version identifier (e.g., /v1/).

owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.name: owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-management-api-info
owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.description: OWASP API9:2023 - API should document info with contact, license and terms of service for proper governance.
owasp:api9:2023-improper-inventory-manag.message: {{description}}. The 'info' object at '{{path}}' should include contact information.

owasp:api10:2023-unsafe-consumption-of-a.name: owasp:api10:2023-unsafe-consumption-of-apis-server-description
owasp:api10:2023-unsafe-consumption-of-a.description: OWASP API10:2023 - Server entries should have descriptions to document the purpose and trust level of external APIs.

owasp:api10:2023-unsafe-consumption-of-a.name: owasp:api10:2023-unsafe-consumption-of-apis-external-link-description
owasp:api10:2023-unsafe-consumption-of-a.description: OWASP API10:2023 - External documentation links should have descriptions to identify trusted vs untrusted sources.
owasp:api10:2023-unsafe-consumption-of-a.message: {{description}}. External docs at '{{path}}' should have a description.
